data.body: PREPLANNING_CONTEXT: {"version":1,"epicId":"6cd2-da08","generatedAt":"2026-04-05T18:48:28Z","generatedBy":"preplanning","epic":{"title":"Proactive self-improvement: agents suggest guidance improvements during normal work","description":"Lightweight suggestion capture mechanism with agent-driven and automatic paths. Writes immutable JSON to .suggestions/ on tickets orphan branch. Retro synthesizes into guidance edits.","successCriteria":["Agents can record structured suggestions to .suggestions/ via suggestion-record.sh with timestamp-session-id naming and objective/subjective format separation","Stop hook scans tool logs at session end and records mechanical-friction suggestions when configurable thresholds exceeded","Sub-agents emit SUGGESTION: sentinel extracted by PostToolUse hook","using-lockpick guidance instructs agents to record suggestions as advisory guidance","/dso:retro produces Friction Suggestions section with frequency-ranked clusters and proposed
